title: 48 - Family Birthdays
description: دو دوست درباره ماه تولد اعضای خانواده حرف می‌زنند.

sentences.text: When is your birthday, Mia?
My birthday is in December.
Nice! My birthday is in February.
sentences.translation: چه خوب! تولد من در فوریه است.

sentences.text: When is your mother's birthday?
My parents' birthdays are in May.
sentences.translation: تولد پدر و مادرم در ماه مه است.

sentences.text: Both parents in the same month?
Yes. And my grandparents' celebration is in July.
sentences.translation: بله. و جشن پدربزرگ و مادربزرگم در ژوئیه است.

sentences.text: What about your sister and brother?
My sister's birthday is in January, and my brother's is in March.
sentences.translation: تولد خواهرم در ژانویه و برادرم در مارس است.

sentences.text: Any other family birthdays?
My uncle's is in June and my aunt's is in August.
sentences.translation: تولد عمویم در ژوئن و خاله‌ام در اوت است.

sentences.text: Your family is big!
Yes. My niece was born in September and my nephew in October.
sentences.translation: بله. خواهرزاده‌ام در سپتامبر و برادرزاده‌ام در اکتبر به دنیا آمد.

sentences.text: And November?
My cousin's party is in November.
That is a lot of parties!
Can you guess my age?
sentences.translation: می‌توانی سن من را حدس بزنی؟

sentences.text: Hmm, are you twenty?
No, I turn twenty-one in April.
sentences.translation: نه، در آوریل بیست‌ویک ساله می‌شوم.

sentences.text: Happy early birthday, then!
